channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine hits a Moscow oil refinery and other sites in a large-scale drone attack
item.description: Ukraine launched a major drone attack on Russia early Thursday, one of the largest on Moscow since the Kremlin...

item.title: Read the full text of Trump's preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement to end the war
item.description: Here is the text of the memorandum of understanding signed Wednesday by President Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, as well as P...

item.title: Student loan borrowers can get a rate cut by enrolling in auto pay
item.description: The Trump administration aims to boost student loan repayment as federal debt nears $2 trillion.

item.title: You may be using too many skincare products. Here are the 3 essentials
item.description: We asked six skincare experts which products are truly necessary for healthy, attractive skin. Here is their advice.
